items.title: New: Which soon-to-be free agents could be the next Dominick Barlow or Jabari Walker?
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
New: Which soon-to-be free agents could be the next Dominick Barlow or Jabari Walker?

A whole lot of words about the standout names on the two-way contract market, where the Sixers found significant value during Daryl Morey’s tenure. Can they keep it up?

www.phillyvoice.com/sixers-news-...

media.title: Which free agents could be the Sixers' next two-way contract success stories?
media.description: Can the Sixers find their next Dominick Barlow or Jabari Walker on the two-way market this summer?

items.title: We have exercised the team options on Dominick Barlow and Dalen Terry.
items.author: Philadelphia 76ers
items.body_excerpt: We have exercised the team options on Dominick Barlow and Dalen Terry.

items.title: 76ers exercise team option for Dominick Barlow
items.author: NBC Sports
items.body_excerpt: 76ers exercise team option for Dominick Barlow NBC Sports

items.title: Can confirm via a league source that the Sixers are picking up the team options for Dominick Barlow ($3.4 million) and Dalen Terry ($2.6 million) for the 2026-27 season. They also must make a team option decision on Trendon Watford ($2.8 million) by the end of today.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt: Can confirm via a league source that the Sixers are picking up the team options for Dominick Barlow ($3.4 million) and Dalen Terry ($2.6 million) for the 2026-27 season. They also must make a team option decision on Trendon Watford ($2.8 million) by the end of today.

items.title: It appears the Sixers will not work out a long-term deal with Dominick Barlow and instead are set to pick up his $3,415,000 team option today:
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
It appears the Sixers will not work out a long-term deal with Dominick Barlow and instead are set to pick up his $3,415,000 team option today:

www.phillyvoice.com/sixers-news-...

media.title: Report: Sixers accept Dominick Barlow's $3.4 million team option
media.description: Dominick Barlow averaged 7.7 points, 4.8 rebounds, 1.2 assists, 0.9 blocks, 0.7 steals and 23.8 minutes across 71 games (59 starts) for the 2025-26 Sixers.
